name: Corporation Tax
description: Context for translating SAS programs related to Corporation Tax (CT) processing. Covers company returns, trade income, and loss relief tables.

tableMappings.notes: All Corporation Tax tables live in the corp_tax Hive schema

columns.name: accounting_period
columns.description: Accounting period end date as YYYY-MM

columns.name: accounting_period
columns.description: Accounting period end date as YYYY-MM

businessRules: Deduplication on company_id should always use accounting_period as a secondary key
accounting_period is stored as YYYY-MM string, not a date — use string comparison for ordering
CT rate depends on company size: 12.5% standard, 25% higher rate — join with reference.ct_rates
Loss relief carry-forward must be applied in chronological order by accounting_period
The corp_tax.returns table is partitioned by accounting_period — always include it in WHERE for performance
promptNotes: This is internal Revenue Commissioners data. Never suggest external table names or schemas not listed above.
